models.description: LGBM — raw return rank target, walk-forward CV (folds through fold 95), train_cutoff 2025-12-07. WFCV IC 0.3185, hit rate ~61%. Champion.
LGBM — quality-adjusted composite rank target, walk-forward CV (folds through fold 95), train_cutoff 2025-12-07. WFCV IC 0.2159. Candidate.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 21d horizon, walk-forward CV (folds through fold 97), train_cutoff 2026-02-10. Medium-term signal. Candidate.
LGBM — composite rank target, 21d horizon, walk-forward CV (folds through fold 97), train_cutoff 2026-02-10. Medium-term signal. Candidate.

LGBM — momentum-cohort filter (27%), 63d market-excess rank target. Drops value_x_momentum + quality_x_momentum vs v1. WFCV IC 0.0843, test IC 0.1453, backtest top-decile 33.18% ann / Sharpe 5.45. Candidate.

LGBM — momentum-cohort filter (27% of universe, momentum_12_1>0.10 & above SMA200), 63d market-excess rank target, walk-forward CV (57 folds). Mean WFCV IC 0.1088, test IC 0.1589, hit rate 58.4%. Candidate.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 7y dataset, walk-forward CV. Mean WFCV IC 0.146, test IC 0.314, hit rate 61.2%. Retired in favour of v10.
LGBM — quality-adjusted composite rank target, 7y dataset, walk-forward CV. Mean WFCV IC 0.150, test IC 0.240, hit rate 58.2%. Retired in favour of v10.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 10y dataset. IC 0.180. Retired.
LGBM — composite target, 10y dataset. IC 0.171. Retired.
LSTM h256-L2 — clip target, walk-forward CV (6 folds, EMA 180d) + 53-anchor finetune, dataset through 2026-03-26. Mean WFCV IC-63d 0.1343. Candidate.
LSTM h256-L2 — clip target, walk-forward CV (6 folds, EMA 180d). Mean WFCV IC-63d 0.197, IC-21d 0.147. Retired in favour of v3.
Set Transformer — sector-relative rank target, cross-stock attention, d_model=128. Test IC 0.141. Retired pending CPU optimization.
LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_63d > 30%). Momentum cohort, 57 WFCV folds. Mean P@10 0.189. Surfaced as breakoutProb_30pct_63d, not blended into MLScore.
LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_63d > 20%). Momentum cohort, 57 WFCV folds. Mean P@10 0.325. Surfaced as breakoutProb_20pct_63d, not blended into MLScore.

LGBM binary classifier — P(forward_252d > 100%). Momentum cohort, 49 WFCV folds. Mean P@10 0.400 (4 of 10 top picks return >100% in 1y vs 5.7% base rate). Multi-bagger detector. Surfaced as breakoutProb_100pct_252d.
